2238420.name: Chained Echoes (Original Game Soundtrack)
2238420.description: The Chained Echoes (Original Game Soundtrack) by Eddie Marianukroh features 50 tracks of music influenced by the classic 90's era JRPGs, set to Matthias Linda's masterfully crafted story that is Chained Echoes. Spanning over two hours of music and accompanied by performances from an array of talented musicians, this soundtrack is another contribution to the vast sea of video game music inspired by the classics that many have grown up with and still revere.
2238420.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 韩语
